The Wailua WWTP is in a tsunami zone and may be relocated before additional collection to this plant can be considered.
See relevant document(s) below.

Name: Hanalei
Details:
The Hanalei Initiative has completed a USDA-funded feasibility study evaluating area-wide wastewater options for Hanalei’s remaining cesspools and older septic systems. The effort has now moved into the next planning phase, with the Hanalei Initiative working with EPA to begin a Preliminary Engineering Report for a liquid pressure sewer system. According to a 10/8/25 meeting with the Kauai Division of Wastewater Management, there could be significant groundwater and shoreline constraints if there were to be a project in this area.
See relevant document(s) below.
